/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -fno-strict-aliasing -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g -DACC_SAFE_QUEUE -DAPI_TRACE -DARRAY_GUARD -DERROR_INSERT -DNDB_DEBUG -DVM_TRACE -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/SectionIterators-t.dir/SectionIterators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SectionIterators-t.dir/NdbApiSignal.cpp.o -o ../../../../runtime_output_directory/SectionIterators-t  ../../../../unittest/mytap/libmytap.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
